{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205582896AC21F887BBC59C8D22"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7568885322946560830","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点逻辑，但不多，只要一细究就会发现小说有许多漏洞，不过也比大多数爽文好点了[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762271734,"group_id":"7566234973884124222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N14XdkdMYnnfmcOEBlqoC2E=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"66817329809","user_name":"用户22769930"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"66817329809","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566234973884124222","book_info":{"abstract":"一条神秘短信，让超市经理陈默提前嗅到末日气息：“三日内，物资即生命。”
他躲进防空洞，却遭女友背叛，物资尽失。
逃出生天后，他带着小孩豆豆与退休教师周桂芬，在感染者横行的城市中挣扎求生。

从背叛到信任，从绝望到微光，
他们突破尸潮、穿越废土，在山谷村落建立临时家园，
却揭开更黑暗的真相——第七庇护所的辐射悲剧、北方残骸中的“场效应”起源……

当幸存者营地沦为权力猎场，当变异鼠群吞噬同伴，
陈默遇到坚韧冷静的女大学生沈冰，组成“微光小队”，
渡江东迁，结识森林部落，最终抵达沿海的“望潮”营地。

然而，这一切只是开始。
他们觉醒特殊能力，直面星空来客的警示：
人类不过是“摇篮”中待宰的羔羊，而猎手，已然苏醒……
这是末世中普通人成为守护者的史诗，
也是废墟之上，爱与人性的最后微光。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2ec23bb3d05cd8ea7a78a88b892b0517~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"临川一梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7566234973884124222","book_name":"末日求生：从囤货者到人类救世主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7566235202196881982","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"302308"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"148","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2ec23bb3d05cd8ea7a78a88b892b0517~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779314308&x-signature=feJhxOU31ONJ7hP4jIyNQAApXas%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111197152628","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205582896AC21F887BBC59C8D22"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7566234973884124222","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"",
